reviews.review_msg: Cecile is really nice, and she's very passionate about teaching.
She is genuinely such a wonderful human love her so much and makes beginner french fun
Wonderful and sweet professor, willing to help far beyond any other profs ever, kindest woman I know, please take this class if you get a chance with her! If you do the homework, you can get an A.
She is a really great teacher. She's funny, nice, caring and she explains the material really well :)

DO NOT TAKE HER CLASS I took this class as an easy A because I was in French immersion for 6 years and this course was tough even for me (semi fluet) She talked in French almost the entire class expecting everyone to understand her when very few did. You have oral exams paired with a random student and if they mess up you lose marks because of it.

You can't really know until you're in there if shes teaching, it won't say when you sign up for the course. She's very kind but if you actually want to learn the subject she's not the teacher for you. She has trouble explaining things and isn't very good at actually teaching. She often made things much more complicated than really needed.

Honestly the best professor I've ever had. Passionate about teaching and he will use different approaches for students at different levels to understand. Great atmosphere.. you'll walk out of the class saying bye to every single person. I've had two courses with him with great results, and I hope to see him in upper level courses! TAKE IT!
